headline: S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100 Surge: AMD Earnings Steal the Show at Midday
summary: Chip stocks are having a moment, and AMD is leading the charge. Oil prices are tanking, too. Here's what you need to know.

headline: PNK Group Builds Manufacturing and Distribution Facility for Rinnai in Georgia
summary: Industrial developer PNK Group has completed a 306,000-square-foot build-to-suit manufacturing and distribution facility for Rinnai America Corporation in Griffin, Georgia. The lease was signed in August 2025.

raw.headline: PNK Group Builds Manufacturing and Distribution Facility for Rinnai in Georgia

headline: Bill Gates Owns Billions in This Secret AI Player Up Nearly 183% in a Year, and It’s Not Microsoft
summary: Everyone knows Bill Gates’ Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) story. The interesting position sits one line further down the Gates Foundation Trust’s 13F: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT), the yellow-iron giant most investors still file under “old economy.” According to the most recent filing, the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust holds 6,353,614 shares of CAT, valued at $3,639,794,852, with sole ...
